criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI features within the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analysis

criteria.name: Educational Content Quality
criteria.description: Quality and relevance of the educational material provided.
criteria.sources: User reviews, educational reviews, expert analysis

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Ease of use and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app descriptions, expert analysis

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: Availability and performance across different platforms and devices.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analysis

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Unique features and innovations brought by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analysis

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated with new features and bug fixes.
criteria.sources: App store update history, developer blogs
